semantic.role: Vitest unit test suite for the AggregationTask pipeline task.
responsibilities: Verifies that AggregationTask correctly orchestrates directory and project aggregation.
Mocks infrastructure dependencies (aggregator, checkpoint) to isolate task logic.
Ensures proper error handling when aggregation initialization fails.
outOfScope: Does not test full integration with real LLM or database layers.
Does not cover aggregation correctness beyond task execution flow.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule violation check: satisfied).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide isolated behavioral verification for the AggregationTask class, ensuring the task properly delegates to aggregator and checkpoint services.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent code changes captured in this file; the intent is maintenance of test coverage.
